creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mikhail T. from comment #4)
With you proposed change, the build fails:

--- libmng_prop_xs.o ---
/usr/local/bin/ccache cc  -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing  -I/usr/local/include -DMNG_SUPPORT_WRITE   -MD  -MF.depend.libmng_prop_xs.o -MTlibmng_prop_xs.o -std=gnu99 -Wno-format-zero-length -nobuiltininc -idirafter /usr/lib/clang/16/include -fstack-protector-strong    -Qunused-arguments     -c libmng_prop_xs.c -o libmng_prop_xs.o
--- libmng_chunk_io.o ---
libmng_chunk_io.c:538:14: error: no member named 'sZlib' in 'struct mng_data_struct'
      pData->sZlib.next_out  = *pOutbuf;
      ~~~~~  ^
libmng_chunk_io.c:539:14: error: no member named 'sZlib' in 'struct mng_data_struct'
      pData->sZlib.avail_out = *iOutsize;
      ~~~~~  ^
libmng_chunk_io.c:543:27: error: no member named 'sZlib' in 'struct mng_data_struct'
      *iRealsize = pData->sZlib.total_out;
                   ~~~~~  ^
3 errors generated.
*** [libmng_chunk_io.o] Error code 1

What was the purpose of your removal of patch-conf in [1]? The commit message makes no sense. After reverting that, graphics/qt5-imageformats and multimedia/mplayer build again. Could you please just revert that commit?

https://github.com/FreeBSD/freebsd-ports/commit/330e763f39ad2ffca43df9b2c9e37db3f0bb2d78
